name: B/m Herb Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion, garlic, and herbs.
3. Saute over medium heat until the onion is soft, about 5 minutes.
4. Cool to room temperature.
5. Place all ingredients in the bread pan (including the cooled onion mixture).
6. Select Dough setting and press Start.
7. When dough has risen long enough, the machine will beep.
8. Turn off the bread machine, remove the bread pan, and turn out the dough onto a floured countertop or cutting board.
9. Gently roll and stretch the dough into a 24-inch rope.
10. For 1 1/2 lbs: With a sharp knife, divide the dough into 18 pieces.
11. Roll each piece into balls and place them in a greased muffin tin (or) on a greased cookie sheet.
12. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 30 - 45 minutes until doubled.
13. Bake in a 400°F oven for 12-15 minutes until golden.
14. Serve warm.
